title: San Lorenzo, CE — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to San Lorenzo, CE: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

San Lorenzo is a city in CE with a population of 250,000. A suburb of Asunción, home to the National University of Asunción and a growing commercial center.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
